name: Book Pressure Consensus (Simplified)
hypothesis: The parent spec 'iter013_mega_consensus_loosened' was inconsistent, with feedback suggesting the trade flow component was unstable. This spec simplifies the formula by removing the 'zscore(trade_imbalance_signed)' component, relying solely on the powerful book pressure consensus signal `(obi_1 + obi_ex_bbo) - 2 * ask_depth_concentration` which has performed exceptionally well in prior iterations (e.g., iter003_full_consensus_tight). This should yield a more robust and consistent signal.
mutation_note: Following 'drop_feature' recommendation. Removed the 'zscore(trade_imbalance_signed)' component from the parent formula to isolate the successful book pressure consensus signal. Increased the threshold from 1.2 to 1.5 to match the original successful parent 'iter003_full_consensus_tight'.
